title: Dashboard widget descriptions
excerpt: Please add a description area on dashboard widgets to explain what data is being displayed and how it’s filtered. Currently, the only way to provide context for the data is to include it in the title which gets really lo…

posts.author: daniwhetstone (Danielle Whetstone)
posts.cookedHtml: Please add a description area on dashboard widgets to explain what data is being displayed and how it’s filtered. Currently, the only way to provide context for the data is to include it in the title which gets really long.
